title: Platformization in Modern Cybersecurity
content:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of cybersecurity, comprehensive identity management is becoming essential for corporate safety. Palo Alto Networks provides companies with advanced identity management products that ensure secure internal user access and protect employee identities. The breadth of these offerings allows the company to actively pursue a broad platformization strategy. By consolidating its diverse services, Palo Alto Networks is structuring its capabilities into three primary AI-driven platforms: Prisma Cloud, Cortex, and Strata. This unified structure enables the firm to approach customers with a comprehensive suite of complementary products tailored to specific business needs.

Furthermore, this strategic consolidation creates significant opportunities for business growth. Palo Alto Networks can effectively upsell customers on new, highly efficient products that ultimately save money. This ability to deliver integrated, cost-effective solutions helps the company muscle out smaller or less adaptable competitors. Currently, the company dominates the cybersecurity sector and is well-positioned to withstand emerging competitive threats. Overall, its innovative use of artificial intelligence and platform consolidation suggests that its future growth prospects remain incredibly strong.
